name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chocolate cookie crumbs, sugar, and melted oleo. Line a pie plate with this mixture and bake at 450°F for 5 minutes. Cool.
2. Soften the gelatin in the cream over hot water. Let it cool.
3. Beat the sugar into the egg yolks. Add the Creme de menthe, Creme de cacoa, and softened gelatin to the yolk mixture and mix well.
4. Refrigerate the mixture for 15 minutes until slightly thickened.
5. Whip the whipping cream and fold it into the thickened gelatin mixture.
6. Pour the filling into the cooled cookie crust and chill until firm. Optionally, sprinkle crushed mint-flavored chocolate on top.
(Warning: This recipe contains raw eggs. Please handle with care to prevent foodborne illness.)
